verification_gate: Each domain begins read-only, has explicit authority and privacy, defines simulation and approval for impact, and includes rollback, proof, and a bounded next action.

personal finance.authority: David final; §6 no unauthorized spend; spend+trading -> §11 Needs-Human-Approval
personal finance.privacy: owner-scoped, encrypted, local-first, per-account consent, retention, no silent share
personal finance.simulation_for_impact: money movement run as WorldSeed -> SimulationReport (balance diffs, failure nodes) as constraints
personal finance.rollback: pre-mutation snapshot + PITR + revision spine; reversal is a new revision
personal finance.bounded_next_action: read-only ingest of balances + transaction history; no spend

health.authority: David final; health action is §11 external-real-world action -> Needs-Human-Approval; blocked_paths forbid health action here
health.privacy: most-sensitive: encrypted, strict per-record consent, no provider/family share without grant, retention+deletion authority
health.simulation_for_impact: any health action run as WorldSeed first; SimulationReport as constraints
health.approval_for_impact: §11 external-action + any health-data share -> Needs-Human-Approval; nothing leaves boundary silently
health.rollback: snapshot + PITR + revision spine; provider share revoked via new revision
health.bounded_next_action: read-only ingest of health records/metrics; no health action

legal.begins_read_only: Ingest contracts/filings/obligations + extract deadlines; no filing/signing/commitment
legal.authority: David final; §6 no legal bypass; legal action -> §11 Needs-Human-Approval
legal.privacy: privileged, owner-scoped, encrypted, consent-gated, retained per obligation, no share without grant
legal.simulation_for_impact: proposed legal action run as WorldSeed; SimulationReport surfaces missed-deadline/invalid-filing failure nodes
legal.rollback: snapshot + PITR + revision spine; source blob immutable by SHA-256 (read-only ingest non-destructive)
legal.bounded_next_action: read-only ingest of legal documents + deadline extraction; no legal action

files.begins_read_only: Catalog fs_node metadata + blob content_sha256; no write/move/rename/overwrite/delete
files.authority: owner_principal_id; write/move/delete require grant; §6 no mutation without snapshot
files.privacy: encrypted at rest, local-first, per-file/per-tree grants, owner retention+deletion authority
files.simulation_for_impact: move/dedup/cleanup/delete run as WorldSeed -> projected tree diffs as constraints
files.approval_for_impact: §11 destructive/irreversible ops (delete/overwrite) Needs-Human-Approval; no mutation without snapshot
files.rollback: revision spine + BlobStore SHA-256 immutability -> exact tree+bytes via envctl materialization; PITR restores catalog
files.bounded_next_action: read-only catalog of user-space files into fs_node with content_sha256; no mutation

calendar.authority: David final; event side effects or invite sends -> §11 external-real-world/communication-send Needs-Human-Approval
calendar.privacy: owner-scoped, encrypted, consent-gated; attendee PII; no share without grant
calendar.simulation_for_impact: schedule change run as WorldSeed; SimulationReport surfaces conflicts/downstream impact as constraints
calendar.approval_for_impact: §11 invite-send (blocked here) + external side effect -> Needs-Human-Approval
calendar.rollback: snapshot + PITR + revision spine; cancelled/moved event is a new revision
calendar.bounded_next_action: read-only ingest of events + conflict view; no event mutation, no invite send

contacts.begins_read_only: Ingest names/handles/relationships + dedup candidates; no create/edit/merge/message
contacts.authority: owner_principal_id; messaging a contact is communication-send -> §11 Needs-Human-Approval (blocked here)
contacts.privacy: PII: owner-scoped, encrypted, consent-gated, retention+deletion authority, no share without grant
contacts.simulation_for_impact: merge/dedup/edit/outreach run as WorldSeed; SimulationReport writes merge-collision constraints
contacts.approval_for_impact: §11 approval on simulated merge/edit diff; outbound message -> communication-send Needs-Human-Approval
contacts.rollback: snapshot + PITR + revision spine; merge reversible as new revision, prior rows preserved
contacts.bounded_next_action: read-only ingest of contacts + dedup candidates; no mutation, no outreach

communications.begins_read_only: Ingest threads/messages (body_sha256)/attachments; no send/reply, drafts only
communications.authority: David final; any send is §11 external-real-world action -> Needs-Human-Approval; blocked_paths forbid communication send
communications.privacy: owner-scoped, encrypted, consent-gated, retained; redactions are new revisions; no thread share without grant
communications.simulation_for_impact: proposed send/reply run as WorldSeed producing draft + projected recipients; wrong-recipient failure node
communications.rollback: drafts discarded; durable rows via revision spine + PITR; unsent-by-design (gate precedes any dispatch)
communications.bounded_next_action: read-only ingest of communication threads + surface unread/important; no send, no reply

knowledge.begins_read_only: Ingest notes/documents (body_sha256) + build semantic index + graph_edge links; no edit/reorg/delete
knowledge.authority: owner_principal_id; bulk edit/deletion require grant + §6 no mutation without snapshot
knowledge.privacy: owner-scoped, encrypted, consent-gated, retained+deletable, no share without grant
knowledge.simulation_for_impact: summarize/reorganize/merge/delete run as WorldSeed over a COW branch -> projected diffs; failed reorg -> failure capsule
knowledge.approval_for_impact: §11 approval on simulated COW-branch diff; irreversible deletion Needs-Human-Approval
knowledge.rollback: COW branch_id isolation + revision spine + PITR; unmerged branch discarded, merged change reversible
knowledge.proof: ProofRecord binds SimulationReport + COW merge selection + approval + snapshot + revision
knowledge.bounded_next_action: read-only ingest of knowledge base + semantic index + link graph; no edit, no deletion

tasks.authority: owner; delegation bounded (no unlimited agent authority, runtime rule); external-effect task escalates via §11 gate
tasks.simulation_for_impact: external-effect task run as WorldSeed; SimulationReport as constraints (compiler mental model)
tasks.approval_for_impact: §11 task that would spend/send/act inherits that domain's Needs-Human-Approval; planning edits bounded+reversible
tasks.rollback: snapshot + PITR + revision spine; completed/reopened task is a new revision
tasks.bounded_next_action: read-only ingest of personal tasks + prioritized action-free view; no execution

family coordination.begins_read_only: Read shared items already within existing consent-backed grants; no new grant/share/send
family coordination.authority: David final; cross-principal sharing requires explicit consent-backed grant (no data leaves boundary silently)
family coordination.privacy: per-member consent + per-member grants; each member's data owner-scoped, encrypted; scoped, revocable shares
family coordination.simulation_for_impact: share/grant or coordination message run as WorldSeed showing exactly which records cross to which member; over-share failure node
family coordination.approval_for_impact: §11 share/grant requires member consent + David approval; coordination message is communication-send (blocked here)
family coordination.rollback: grant revocation is a new revision (valid_to set), never delete; PITR + revision spine restore pre-share access-control state
family coordination.proof: ProofRecord binds SimulationReport + consent record + approval + snapshot + grant revision
family coordination.bounded_next_action: read-only ingest of shared family items within existing consent; no new share, no grant, no send

cross_cutting_grounding.constitution_ss6: no hidden mutation; no unauthorized spend; no legal bypass; no real-world execution without authority; no production mutation without snapshot; no completion without proof (Master Plan §6)
cross_cutting_grounding.execution_gates_ss11: Needs-Human-Approval for spend, legal, external real-world action, production mutation, account creation, credential handling, trading, physically-impactful home automation, anything irreversible; approval requires bounded+reversible+evidence-sufficient (Master Plan §11)
cross_cutting_grounding.runtime_rule: no agent receives unlimited authority; every meaningful action passes through identity, policy, memory, simulation, execution, proof, and rollback; David is final human authority
cross_cutting_grounding.cell_law: policy-cell: network denied by default, read-only FS except writable_paths, no mutation without snapshot; simulation writes constraints not advice, failed world -> failure capsule
cross_cutting_grounding.personal_001_privacy_inheritance: each domain inherits ownership, consent, local-first storage, encryption, access(grant), retention, export/sharing, deletion authority, backup, recovery; no personal data leaves its boundary silently

substrate_mapping_under_store_001.redb_role: transient buffer/scratchpad/WAL/BLAKE3 dedup only; never a second durable writer for a personal class
substrate_mapping_under_store_001.recovery_source: PostgreSQL PITR + revision spine; blob content self-verifies by SHA-256
substrate_mapping_under_store_001.no_sidecar: semantic_embedding + graph_edge analytics native in PostgreSQL via RuVector
substrate_mapping_under_store_001.secrets: credentials/secrets referenced by keyring handle only; never stored in the personal model (STORE-001 external-secret class)

store_001_alignment: Every durable personal domain class in all ten workflows names PostgreSQL + RuVector as its single canonical durable owner (STORE-001 invariant 'Single durable writer'), mapping onto the POSTGRES-002 substrate families domain_record / fs_node / blob / communication / principal / grant / graph_edge / revision. redb holds only its intended transient roles (buffer / scratchpad / application-level WAL / BLAKE3 dedup) with forward-only envctl sync (invariant 'Forward-only sync'); the blob-backed classes (finance statements, legal documents, files, attachments) migrate off the transitional redb source-blob store only under the verified BlobStore SHA-256 parity cutover (invariant 'Verified cutover'); RuVector runs native for the knowledge domain's semantic index and the relationship graph (invariant 'No sidecar'); every row carries witness_root + provenance and content-addressed classes keep their SHA-256 identity (invariant 'Provenance preserved'); credentials stay in the OS keyring (external-secret class). No durable class is silently reclassified.
proof_summary: PERSONAL-002 defines ten bounded personal-domain workflow families in generated/task_families/PERSONAL-002.json — personal finance (PERSONAL-002-A), health (-B), legal (-C), files (-D), calendar (-E), contacts (-F), communications (-G), knowledge (-H), tasks (-I), and family coordination (-J) — and each satisfies all eight gate clauses with concrete, grounded values. Every domain begins read-only: finance ingests balances/transactions with no spend, health ingests records with no health action, legal ingests documents and extracts deadlines with no filing, files catalog fs_node metadata with no write/delete, calendar ingests events with no invite-send, contacts ingest with no message, communications ingest threads as drafts-only with no send, knowledge builds a read-only semantic index, tasks ingest with no execution, and family coordination reads only items already inside an existing consent-backed grant. Explicit authority is named per domain and rooted in Constitution §6 (no unauthorized spend, no legal bypass, no real-world execution without authority, no mutation without snapshot, no completion without proof), the runtime rule (no unlimited agent authority; David is final human authority), and the §11 Needs-Human-Approval gate (spend, legal, external action, trading, credential handling, anything irreversible). Explicit privacy per domain inherits the PERSONAL-001 personal-data family — ownership, consent, local-first encrypted storage, grant-based access, retention, export/sharing, deletion authority, and recovery — with the invariant that no personal data leaves its boundary silently; health, legal, and contacts are called out as the most-sensitive/PII classes. Each domain defines simulation for impact via a DevWorld WorldSeed producing a SimulationReport that writes constraints (not advice), with failed worlds becoming failure capsules, and defines the §11 Needs-Human-Approval step before any impact crosses out of read-only. Rollback is the pre-mutation snapshot plus PostgreSQL PITR plus the append-only revision spine (COW branch isolation for knowledge, grant-revocation-as-new-revision for shares, BlobStore SHA-256 immutability for content). Proof is a ProofRecord binding simulation + approval + snapshot + revision before any workflow closes (Constitution §6 no completion without proof). Each domain declares exactly one read-only bounded next action, honoring the PERSONAL-002 next_action to decompose one read-only workflow per domain before any action. The whole family sits on the STORE-001 governed substrate (PostgreSQL + RuVector canonical, redb transient, forward-only envctl sync, verified SHA-256 blob cutover, No-Sidecar RuVector, secrets in keyring) and respects every blocked path: no health or legal action, no spend, no communication send, no credential access, no product implementation, no secrets. This is a planning artifact only — no personal service or data was accessed and no product execution was performed.
